title: Accumulator
description: Adds a redstone block that pulls in entities in front of it. Uses materials from the Amarite mod. Made for my own personal use, as it requires Connector/Kilt.
body:
This mod adds the Accumulator, a redstone component that takes up a full block.

It can be placed in all 6 directons, and pulls in entities towards the face, while slightly hurting them.

It's based off of the Amarite mod, however that mod was made for Fabric, while this one was made for Forge, meaning you will need Sinytra Connector or Kilt to use it.

Since this mod was made for my own personal use, I didn't see the point in trying to make it a Fabric mod when I'm fine with using Sinytra Connector. If you really want it on Fabric, I might see what I can do, but that's not guaranteed.

-----------


Something else worth mentioning:


The only reason this requires the Amarite mod to work is because it uses amarite in the crafting recipe. You could easily just add this in without Amarite and it will work fine, just completely unobtainable in survival.
